message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
  BorderColor #333333
  FontName Arial
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFCC
  BorderColor #999999
  FontName Arial
  FontSize 11
}
skinparam enum {
  BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
  BorderColor #333333
  FontName Arial
  FontSize 12
}

class "Airport" as Airport {
  <<Thread>>
  list<Runway> lst_runways
  list<AirportOperation> lst_operations
  --
  bool permission_to_take_off(Airplane)
  bool permission_to_land(Airplane)
  void start_thread()
}

class "AirportOperation" as AirportOperation {
  Runway run_way
  Airplane airplane
  uint32_t time_request
  uint32_t time_last_update
  EnumAirportOperation operation_state
  --
  void free_runway()
}

class "Airplane" as Airplane {
  <<Thread>>
  uint32_t id
  uint32_t fuel
  uint32_t fuel_consumption_rate
  uint32_t airport_answer_timeout
  AirplaneState state
  --
  void start_thread()
  void take_off_authorized()
  void take_off_denied()
  void land_authorized()
  void land_denied()
}

class "Runway" as Runway {
  uint32_t id
  RunwayState state
}

enum "RunwayState" as RunwayState {
  Free
  InUse
}

enum "AirplaneState" as AirplaneState {
  Stopped
  AskingPermissionToTakeOff
  TakingOff
  Flying
  AskingPermissionToLand
  Landing
  Crashed
}

enum "EnumAirportOperation" as EnumAirportOperation {
  WaitingToTakeOff
  AuthorizedToTakeOff
  WaitingToLand
  AuthorizedToLand
}

Airport "1" *-- "0..*" AirportOperation
Airport "1" *-- "0..*" Runway
AirportOperation "1" *-- "1" Runway
AirportOperation "1" *-- "1" Airplane
AirportOperation "1" *-- "1" EnumAirportOperation
Runway "1" *-- "1" RunwayState
Airplane "1" *-- "1" AirplaneState

note right of Airport
  Iterate through lst_operations
  if it matches the criteria that airplane is already flying
  release runway
  update airplane status and related info
  order lst_operations to update next events
end note

@enduml
```
